#### When Asked to work on Tasks:

 - Please make sure to double check the tasks,
   - if things are unclear, 
     - and there is a markdown for the tasks, 
       - add items asking for clarification in the plan appropriately
       - take the rest of your time to look at the other tasks and fill them in as well for efficiency.
     - if there is no markdown for the tasks, 
       - Make a markdown for the tasks and add items asking for clarification in the plan appropriately.
       - take the rest of your time to look at the other tasks and fill them in as well for efficiency.
